labels.analysis: The MCP Server "OpenClaw MCP Ecosystem" provides 5 tools focused on ai/ml tools tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: generate_palette, contrast_check, color_convert, css_gradient, tailwind_colors.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "AI/ML Tools" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: generat.

tools.name: generate_palette
tools.description: Generate a harmonious color palette using color theory. Provide a base color, mood, or both. Returns an array of colors with hex, rgb, hsl, name, and CSS variable. Harmony modes use HSL rotation (complementary=180°, analogous=30°, triadic=120°, etc.).

base_color.description: Base hex color (e.g., "#3b82f6" or "3b82f6"). Optional if mood is provided.

mood.description: Mood/style of the palette. Warm: reds/oranges. Cool: blues/purples. Vibrant: saturated. Pastel: soft. Dark: deep. Earth: natural browns/greens. Neon: electric bright.

count.description: Number of colors to generate (2-10, default: 5)

harmony.description: Color harmony rule. complementary=opposite hue. analogous=adjacent hues. triadic=120° apart. split-complementary=two colors flanking complement. monochromatic=same hue, varying lightness.

tools.name: contrast_check
tools.description: Check WCAG 2.1 accessibility contrast ratio between two colors. Returns the contrast ratio, AA pass/fail (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large), AAA pass/fail (7:1 normal, 4.5:1 large), and suggestions for improving contrast if it fails.

foreground.description: Foreground (text) color as hex (e.g., "#ffffff"), rgb, hsl, or CSS name

background.description: Background color as hex, rgb, hsl, or CSS name

tools.name: color_convert
tools.description: Convert a color between formats: hex, rgb, hsl, and CSS named colors (140 standard names). Input any format and optionally specify the target format. Returns all formats if to_format is omitted.

color.description: Input color in any format: "#3b82f6", "rgb(59,130,246)", "hsl(217,91%,60%)", or CSS name like "cornflowerblue"

to_format.description: Target format (default: all — returns all formats)

tools.name: css_gradient
tools.description: Generate ready-to-use CSS gradient code from an array of hex colors. Supports linear, radial, and conic gradients. Returns the CSS property value and a description of the visual effect.

colors.description: Array of hex colors (e.g., ["#ff6b6b", "#4ecdc4", "#45b7d1"]). Minimum 2 colors.

direction.description: Gradient direction for linear (default: "to right"). Examples: "to bottom", "45deg", "135deg", "to bottom right".

tools.name: tailwind_colors
tools.description: Look up Tailwind CSS v3 color values. Provide color_name to get all shades (50–950), or provide closest_to (a hex value) to find the nearest Tailwind color and shade.

color_name.description: Tailwind color name (e.g., "blue", "emerald", "rose", "slate"). Returns all shades 50–950.

closest_to.description: A hex color (e.g., "#3b82f6"). Returns the nearest Tailwind color and shade.
